name: watson
description: A wonderful CLI to track your time

subcommands.name: add
subcommands.description: Add time to a project with tag(s) that was not tracked live

options.description: Date and time of start of tracked activity
Date and time of end of tracked activity
Confirm creation of new tag

subcommands.name: aggregate
subcommands.description: Display a report of the time spent on each project aggregated by day

options.description: Include currently running frame in report
Don't include currently running frame in report
The date from when the reports should start. Defaults to seven days ago
The date at which the report should stop (inclusive). Defaults to tomorrow
Reports activity only for the given project. You can add other projects by using this option several times
Reports activity only for frames containing the given tag. You can add several tags by using this option multiple times
Format output in JSON instead of plain text
Format output in CSV instead of plain text
View output through a pager
Don't view output through a pager

subcommands.name: cancel
subcommands.description: Cancel the last call to the start command. The time will not be recorded

options.description: Edit the configuration file with an editor
Confirm addition of new project
Confirm creation of new tag

subcommands.name: frames
subcommands.description: Display the list of all frame IDs

subcommands.name: log
subcommands.description: Display each recorded session during the given timespan

options.description: Include currently running frame in report
Don't include currently running frame in report
Reverse the order of the days in output
Don't Reverse the order of the days in output
The date from when the log should start. Defaults to seven days ago
The date at which the log should stop (inclusive). Defaults to tomorrow
Reports activity for the current year
Reports activity for the current month
Reports activity for the current moon cycle
Reports activity for the current week
Reports activity for the current day
Reports all activities
Logs activity only for the given project. You can add other projects by using this option several times
Logs activity only for frames containing the given tag. You can add several tags by using this option multiple times
Logs activity for all projects but the given ones. You can ignore several projects by using the option multiple times. Any given project will be ignored
Logs activity for all tags but the given ones. You can ignore several tags by using the option multiple times. Any given tag will be ignored
Format output in JSON instead of plain text
Format output in CSV instead of plain text
View output through a pager
Don't view output through a pager

subcommands.name: merge
subcommands.description: Perform a merge of the existing frames with a conflicting frames file.  When storing the frames on a file hosting service, there is the possibility that the frame file goes out-of-sync due to one or m

options.description: If specified, then the merge will automatically be performed

subcommands.name: projects
subcommands.description: Display the list of all the existing projects

subcommands.name: remove
subcommands.description: Remove a frame. You can specify the frame either by id or by position (ex: -1 for the last frame)

options.description: Don’t ask for confirmation

subcommands.name: report
subcommands.description: Display a report of the time spent on each project

options.description: Include currently running frame in report
Don't include currently running frame in report
The date from when the report should start. Defaults to seven days ago
The date at which the report should stop (inclusive). Defaults to tomorrow
Reports activity for the current year
Reports activity for the current month
Reports activity for the current moon cycle
Reports activity for the current week
Reports activity for the current day
Reports activity only for the given project. You can add other projects by using this option several times
Reports activity only for frames containing the given tag. You can add several tags by using this option multiple times
Reports activity for all projects but the given ones. You can ignore several projects by using the option multiple times. Any given project will be ignored
Reports activity for all tags but the given ones. You can ignore several tags by using the option multiple times. Any given tag will be ignored
Format output in JSON instead of plain text
Format output in CSV instead of plain text
View output through a pager
Don't view output through a pager

subcommands.name: restart
subcommands.description: Restart monitoring time for a previously stopped project

options.description: Start frame at this time. Must be in (YYYY-MM-DDT)?HH:MM(:SS)? format
Stop an already running project
Don't stop an already running project

subcommands.name: start
subcommands.description: Start monitoring time for the given project. You can add tags indicating more specifically what you are working on with +tag

options.description: Start frame at this time. Must be in (YYYY-MM-DDT)?HH:MM(:SS)? format
Leave gap between end time of previous project and start time of the current
Don't leave gap between end time of previous project and start time of the current
Confirm addition of new project
Confirm creation of new tag

subcommands.name: status
subcommands.description: Display when the current project was started and the time spent since

options.description: Only output project
Only show tags
Only show time elapsed

subcommands.name: stop
subcommands.description: Stop monitoring time for the current project

options.description: Stop frame at this time. Must be in (YYYY-MM-DDT)?HH:MM(:SS)? format

subcommands.name: sync
subcommands.description: Get the frames from the server and push the new ones

subcommands.name: tags
subcommands.description: Display the list of all the tags

options.description: Show help for watson
Show the version for watson
Color output
No color output
